title: Ferax
content:
Ferax is a small moon orbiting the gas giant world of Ketoikana, in the Ikattomeno system. Once highly geologically active, rivaling the moon of Io in the Sol system, Ferax is now completely geologically dead. However, the remains of it's past volcanism are it's most notable feature: much of Ferax is now hollow - vast webs of lava tubes and empty magma chambers permeate throughout the entire moon.

Although the Ikattomeno system sits at a location of strategic importance, the parent star is among the most dangerous in the Hydian Sector, baking the entire system in extreme levels of solar radiation. However, thanks to Ferax's subterranean geography, the interior of the moon is protected from the effects of it's parent star, while still remaining accessible to the outside galaxy. Much of the interior is filled with an interconnected network of industrial zones and habitation areas, with Ferax now serving as the primary world of it's system.

The first species to discover and colonize Ferax were the Ichizhou, it would soon become a key piece of the Ichizhou Empire's border security. Essentially serving as the southwestern "gateway" to the empire, the moon's location was of particular interest to the Lethakos Corporation, the largest of the empire's mega-corporations, specializing in fuel and ship construction. Lethakos found Ferax useful for serving as a hub for it's various mining and exploratory interests, funding much of the construction of the moon's infrastructure. During the collapse of the Ichizhou Empire, Lethakos essentially served as the government of the moon, free to run it as they saw fit, far away from any oversight.
